languages.text: "Нет, Ваша Светлость. Губернатор уточняет, что в летописях {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32-го меровского{/g} упоминаний о таких явлениях нет. Колония на Заркове впервые сталкивается с подобным".

traits.locale_text: "Нет, Ваша Светлость. Губернатор уточняет, что в летописях {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32-го меровского{/g} упоминаний о таких явлениях нет. Колония на Заркове впервые сталкивается с подобным".

languages.text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Colonel-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32nd Merov Regiment{/g}. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

languages.text: 「いいえ、御{mf|御殿|御殿}様。城守総督は、32番メロウ連隊の記録にはそのような現象は記載されていません。これはザルコフ植民地の初めての経験です」
languages.original_text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Castellan-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the 32nd Merov Regiment. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、御{mf|御殿|御殿}様。城守総督は、32番メロウ連隊の記録にはそのような現象は記載されていません。これはザルコフ植民地の初めての経験です」

languages.text: «No, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Su mensaje indicaba que no había mención de ningún fenómeno similar en los anales del {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32.º regimiento de Merov{/g}. Esta es la primera vez que la colonia de Zarkov se enfrenta a algo similar».
languages.original_text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Colonel-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32nd Merov Regiment{/g}. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

traits.locale_text: «No, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Su mensaje indicaba que no había mención de ningún fenómeno similar en los anales del {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32.º regimiento de Merov{/g}. Esta es la primera vez que la colonia de Zarkov se enfrenta a algo similar».

languages.text: “没有，大人。总督上校确认，{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫第32团{/g}的军史档案中从未记载过类似现象。这是扎尔科夫殖民地首次遭遇这类灾变。”
languages.original_text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Colonel-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32nd Merov Regiment{/g}. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

languages.text: "Nein, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. {nc|Der Colonel-Gouverneurin|Dem Colonel-Gouverneur} zufolge gibt es in den Annalen des {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32. Merov-Regiments{/g} keine Erwähnung eines derartigen Phänomens. Zarkov wird zum ersten Mal damit konfrontiert."
languages.original_text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Colonel-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32nd Merov Regiment{/g}. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

languages.text: "Hayır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vali Albay, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32. Merov Alayı'nın{/g} yıllıklarında böyle bir fenomenden bahsedilmediğini belirtti. Bu, Zarkov kolonisinin böylesi ilk deneyimi."
languages.original_text: "No, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The Colonel-Governor stated that there is no mention of such a phenomenon in the annals of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32nd Merov Regiment{/g}. This is the Zarkov colony's first experience of this."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Vali Albay, {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32. Merov Alayı'nın{/g} yıllıklarında böyle bir fenomenden bahsedilmediğini belirtti. Bu, Zarkov kolonisinin böylesi ilk deneyimi."

languages.text: « Non, Votre Seigneurie. D'après {nc|la gouverneure-colonelle|le gouverneur-colonel}, il n'est fait aucune mention d'un tel phénomène dans les annales du {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}32e régiment de Merov{/g}. C'est la première fois que la colonie de Zarkov fait face à cette situation. »
